text:
was a boy who lived in a refugee camp in Marley.

Appearance

Halil was a young boy with a round face, dark hair, dark eyes, and a round nose. He wore a vest over a light, button-up shirt and long pants and he wore a fez atop his head.

Personality

Halil seemed to be more cautious and timid than his friend, begging Ramzi to stop stealing after his right hand was cut off because of it. Even so, he still seemed to be somewhat irrational when it came to money, trying to go back and retrieve Ramzi's money after Ramzi dropped it while fleeing from the Titans.

Story

War for Paradis arc

Sometime after Ramzi's hand is cut off for stealing, he shows Halil, his best friend, where he has been hiding the money that he has been stealing. Halil tries to convince Ramzi to stop, but Ramzi refuses to stop until he has stolen enough to get their family out of the refugee camp. As they talk, they notice a group of passersby fleeing the main city, attempting to escape an army of Titans that has begun marching across Marley.

The two boys return to their refugee camp and flee with the rest of their community. As they are attempting to escape the Titans, Ramzi accidentally drops his money and Halil attempts to retrieve it. Ramzi tries to stop Halil from going back, but the two are both hit by falling debris from the nearby buildings; Halil is killed almost instantly when part of the debris sheers off the right side of his head.

Trivia

The name 'Halil' is derived from the Arabic word "خليل" (transliterated as "Khalil"), which means "friend" or "intimate companion."
